CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This field was created in 1.10 to replace the field Buyer's Total Cash Investment (now labeled Buyer's Cash Investment (Manual)). That field required users to manually calculate and enter a sum. This new field uses a trigger to automatically sum all relevant funding sources. Sum of all Funding Source amounts for which Type = Buyer's Cash, Buyer's Cash (Paid Outside Closing), or Gift (Private). This is the basis for return on investment calculations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of all Funding Source amounts for which Type = Buyer's Cash, Buyer's Cash (Paid Outside Closing), or Gift (Private). This is the basis for return on investment calculations.
CustomField.label: Buyer's Total Investment at Closing
